Package org.rodinp.core.tests

Class SnapshotTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.ModifyingResourceTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.SnapshotTests
public class SnapshotTests extends ModifyingResourceTests
Tests about Rodin file snapshots.

    void
    testFileIsSnapshot()
    Ensures that the isSnapshot() method works properly on Rodin files.
    void
    testFileSnapshotExists()
    Ensures that a snapshot exists iff its underlying file exists.
    void
    testFileSnapshotInvolutive()
    Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa.
    void
    testFileSnapshotParent()
    Ensures that the mutable copy and a snapshot of a file have the same parent.
    void
    testFileSnapshotReadonly()
    Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.
    void
    testIntIsSnapshot()
    Ensures that the isSnapshot() method works properly on non-top internal elements.
    void
    testIntSnapshotExists()
    Ensures that a snapshot exists iff its mutable copy exists.
    void
    testIntSnapshotInvolutive()
    Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa.
    void
    testIntSnapshotParent()
    Ensures that the mutable copy and a snapshot of a top-level internal element have the same parent.
    void
    testIntSnapshotReadonly()
    Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.
    private void
    testIsSnapshot(ISnapshotable mutable)
    Ensures that the isSnapshot() method works properly.
    void
    testSnapshotChangeInternalElementContents()
    Ensures that a snapshot internal element cannot have its contents changed.
    void
    testSnapshotCreateInternalElement()
    Ensures that a snapshot internal element cannot be created.
    void
    testSnapshotDecorrelated()
    Ensures that a snapshot is decorrelated from unsaved changes in a file
    private void
    testSnapshotExists(ISnapshotable mutable)
    Ensures that a snapshot exists if its mutable copy exists.
    private void
    testSnapshotInvolutive(ISnapshotable mutable)
    Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa.
    private void
    testSnapshotNotExists(ISnapshotable mutable)
    Ensures that a snapshot doesn't exist if its mutable copy doesn't.
    private void
    testSnapshotReadonly(ISnapshotable mutable)
    Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.
    void
    testTopIsSnapshot()
    Ensures that the isSnapshot() method works properly on top internal elements.
    void
    testTopSnapshotExists()
    Ensures that a snapshot exists iff its underlying file exists.
    void
    testTopSnapshotInvolutive()
    Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa.
    void
    testTopSnapshotParent()
    Ensures that the mutable copy and a snapshot of a top-level internal element have the same parent.
    void

    Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.

    • testFileIsSnapshot

      public void testFileIsSnapshot()
      Ensures that the isSnapshot() method works properly on Rodin files.

    • testFileSnapshotExists

      public void testFileSnapshotExists() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a snapshot exists iff its underlying file exists.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testFileSnapshotInvolutive

      public void testFileSnapshotInvolutive()
      Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa. Also, ensures that a snapshot is different from a mutable copy.

    • testFileSnapshotParent

      public void testFileSnapshotParent()
      Ensures that the mutable copy and a snapshot of a file have the same parent.

    • testFileSnapshotReadonly

      public void testFileSnapshotReadonly()
      Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.

    • testIsSnapshot

      private void testIsSnapshot(ISnapshotable mutable)
      Ensures that the isSnapshot() method works properly.

    • testSnapshotExists

      private void testSnapshotExists(ISnapshotable mutable)
      Ensures that a snapshot exists if its mutable copy exists.

    • testSnapshotInvolutive

      private void testSnapshotInvolutive(ISnapshotable mutable)
      Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa. Also, ensures that a snapshot is different from a mutable copy.

    • testSnapshotNotExists

      private void testSnapshotNotExists(ISnapshotable mutable)
      Ensures that a snapshot doesn't exist if its mutable copy doesn't.

    • testSnapshotReadonly

      private void testSnapshotReadonly(ISnapshotable mutable)
      Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.

      Ensures that a snapshot exists iff its mutable copy exists.

    • testIntSnapshotInvolutive

      public void testIntSnapshotInvolutive()
      Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa. Also, ensures that a snapshot is different from a mutable copy.

    • testIntSnapshotParent

      public void testIntSnapshotParent()
      Ensures that the mutable copy and a snapshot of a top-level internal element have the same parent.

    • testIntSnapshotReadonly

      public void testIntSnapshotReadonly()
      Ensures that a snapshot is readonly and a mutable copy is not.

      Ensures that the mutable copy of a snapshot is the original handle, and vice-versa. Also, ensures that a snapshot is different from a mutable copy.

      public void testTopSnapshotParent()
